title: 11 Herbal Teas For Vomiting
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas contains bioactive constituents like glycyrrhizin, flavonoids, and terpenoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and soothing properties that help calm the digestive system, reducing nausea and vomiting. Glycyrrhizin, in particular, has been shown to have a stabilizing effect on the stomach, reducing the likelihood of vomiting. The flavonoids present in Glycyrrhiza glabra teas have antioxidant properties that help protect the stomach lining from damage, fur...
